scripts.dev: npm run dev:prepare && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names theme,hugo,pagefind,webp,docs "node scripts/themeGenerator.js --watch" "hugo server --source . --environment development --destination public-dev --renderToMemory=false --bind 0.0.0.0 --port 1313 --disableFastRender --navigateToChanged" "node scripts/pagefindWatch.js --site public-dev" "node scripts/webpWatch.js" "node scripts/docsInheritanceWatch.js"
scripts.dev:prepare: npm run build:theme && npm run docs:validate && npm run docs:materialize-inherited && rm -rf public-dev && hugo --source . --environment development --destination public-dev --cleanDestinationDir && npm run validate:homepage-ctas -- public-dev && npm run build:search-index:dev
scripts.build: npm run build:theme && npm run docs:validate && npm run docs:materialize-inherited && npm run build:site && npm run validate:homepage-ctas
scripts.preview: npm run build:search && hugo server --source . --bind 0.0.0.0 --port 1313 --environment production --disableFastRender --navigateToChanged
scripts.build:search: npm run build && npm run build:search-index
